goal: Add a lightweight Signature concept hierarchy, synonym contract, and relation hints without changing the persisted SignatureTag shape or adding UI.

steps.name: ontology-contract
steps.summary: Documented the Signature ontology contract and kept persisted key/value compatibility explicit.

steps.name: concept-registry
steps.summary: Added SignatureConceptRegistry with approved synonyms, concept ids, value ids, and relation rules.

steps.name: local-engine-integration
steps.summary: Connected concept canonicalization to alias resolution, LocalEvidencePacket relation hints, relation-driven missing info, and Knowledge DB similarity.

steps.name: verification-and-record
steps.summary: Added a Signature concept ontology smoke check and package script. Residual risk is limited to no browser/UI verification because this slice has no UI change.
